subcodes.first_line: O exalted bough of the blessed Lote-Tree! The heart of the world hath been enraptured by the breezes wafting from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفنن الرفیع من السدره المبارکه قد انجذب قلب العالم بالنفحات التی تمر من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @development of capacity and readiness, @differences in human capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
